basics.name: Dr. Isabella Boux
basics.label: Data Scientist | Cognitive Neuroscientist | Linguist
basics.summary: A German-born theoretical physicist, widely ranked among the greatest and most influential scientists of all time

volunteer.summary: Lead organizer for the New York City branch of the People's Climate March, the largest climate march in history.
highlights: Awarded 'Climate Hero' award by Greenpeace for my efforts organizing the march.
Men of the year 2014 by Time magazine

awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to those who have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.

publications.name: Zur Elektrodynamik bewegter Körper
publications.summary: It concerned an interpretation of the Michelson-Morley experiment and the properties of light and time.

publications.name: Über einen die Erzeugung und Verwandlung des Lichtes betreffenden heuristischen Gesichtspunkt
publications.summary: Applied quantum theory to light to explain the photoelectric effect.

publications.name: Die Grundlage der allgemeinen Relativitätstheorie
publications.summary: The publication of general relativity made him internationally famous.

projects.name: Quantum Computing
projects.summary: Quantum computing uses quantum-mechanical phenomena such as superposition and entanglement.
